text:
In the first room, the glass wall feels like both a barrier and an invitation. The collective focus inside suggests productivity and shared intention, yet I remain an observer, reflective and slightly detached.

In the second scene, the vibrant, curious atmosphere of the R+D space energizes me. The merging of art, technology, and intellectual pursuit fills me with excitement: here, questions outnumber answers, and possibility hangs in the air. I feel inspired and restless—eager to engage, to inquire, to participate in creation and discovery.
